data.content:
Plan:
1. Update overview state helpers to classify states into Work Items, Exploration, Gates, and Terminated. Keep lease-type beats filtered out, but no longer hide shipped globally; instead route shipped into Terminated. Add required state lists per tab so Exploration/Gates/Terminated show their expected columns even when empty.
2. Update the overview component to render compact tab controls with per-tab counts, filter displayed columns by selected tab, and tighten the grid floor below 8.5rem while preserving readable tile content. Default to Work Items.
3. Keep existing all-repositories/full-id, single-repo abbreviated-id, active lease info, and empty-column behaviors. Make state-label compaction tab-aware where long labels would crowd narrower columns.
4. Extend focused overview helper tests for state classification, tab grouping/counts, shipped-in-Terminated behavior, required empty tab columns, and preserved label/lease behavior.
5. Verify with focused lint/tests, full repo gates, and browser checks at desktop/mobile confirming tabs, state routing, narrower visible columns, and no page overflow.

Complexity: medium-small UI/data-shaping pass.
Risks: tab counts must be computed from filtered overview beats without lease beats; Work Items must include future/unknown states without accidentally swallowing explicit Exploration/Gates/Terminated states.
